ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League that the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the league that the team belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that the statistic belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season that the statistic belongs to */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored by the team */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats by the team */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits by the team */,
  "homeruns" INTEGER /* Number of home runs by the team */,
  "bat_avg" REAL /* Batting average of the team */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts by the team */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases by the team */,
  "earned_runs" INTEGER /* Number of earned runs allowed by the team */,
  "runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of runs allowed by the team */,
  "batting_avg_against" REAL /* Batting average against the team */,
  "fielding_percentage" REAL /* Fielding percentage of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advanced_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advanced metric */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that the metric belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season that the metric belongs to */,
  "new_onbase" REAL /* New on-base percentage */,
  "new_slug" REAL /* New slugging percentage */,
  "new_obs" REAL /* New on-base plus slugging */,
  "team_efficiency" REAL /* Team efficiency */,
  "strength_of_schedule" REAL /* Strength of schedule */,
  "playoff_chances" REAL /* Playoff chances */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advanced_metrics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advanced_metrics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league standing */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that the standing belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season that the standing belongs to */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the team */,
  "games_behind" INTEGER /* Number of games behind the leader */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_standings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. admin, team owner) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team owner */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that the owner owns */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user that the owner is */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season that the owner is active for */,
  "ownership_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the team owned by the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_owners_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_owners_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_owners_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that the roster entry belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season that the roster entry belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player on the roster */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the roster */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the player */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_rosters_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Hand the player bats with */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Hand the player throws with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season that the game belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that the game belongs to */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player that the injury belongs to */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of the injury */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury */,
  "expected_recovery_time" INTEGER /* Expected recovery time of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
